description: Operational, non-primary source-to-Lean map for CMP116 Eq. (2.37) fixed-Z0prime/post-P source estimate, final post-(2.37) summation and majorization route.

citations.summary: Live-field map for the Eq. (2.37) route after the combined post-P consumer has been theorem-generated.
extracted_claims: Primary source keys: cmp116.eq237.post-p-resummation and cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5.
Existing Lean route derives CMP116PostPResidualSourceBound from fixed-Z0prime Eq. (2.37) premises plus the post-(2.37) final summation.
Remaining work is not more routing: it is the source extraction/proof of the fixed-Z0prime estimate, the final summation, dictionaries and constants.

assumptions: Use cmp116.eq237.post-p-resummation and cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5 as primary anchors.

use_for: Operational routing only: tells agents which primary citation keys and Lean declarations to inspect before attempting a post-P source proof.
Clarifies the exact live fields left after the theorem-generated Eq. (2.37) consumer route.
do_not_use_for: Do not cite this operational card as primary mathematical evidence.
Do not claim Eq. (2.37) source closure from this card; use primary source extraction plus Lean proof.
Do not split Eq. (2.37) into standalone normalized Z0 and Z0prime theorems unless the source supports that split.
open_questions: Exact fixed-Z0prime source estimate as a Lean-facing theorem.
Exact post-(2.37) final source summation and exponent-reserve step.
Source-to-Lean dictionary for D, P, Z0, Z0prime and connected components Zi prime.
Constant hierarchy/majorant theorem for O(1), alpha5, epsilon2, C3 and metric comparisons.

locator.printed_pages: primary anchors: cmp116.eq237.post-p-resummation printed 19-20; cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5 printed 20
locator.pdf_pages: primary anchors: cmp116.eq237.post-p-resummation PDF 19-20; cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5 PDF 20

citations.summary: Target the visually confirmed fixed-Z0prime display before the last Z0prime summation.
extracted_claims: Locator sharpened only: primary citation keys cmp116.eq237.post-p-resummation and cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5 carry printed/PDF pages, local text ranges and render artifacts for this live field.
The display includes an exp(-(kappa1-1)*(LM)^-4*|Z\Z0prime|) reserve factor.
It includes a product over connected components Zi prime of Z0prime with amplitude 2*(L+2)^4*O(1)*epsilon2 and seven-delta decay.
It also contains an exp(O(1)*alpha5*|Z|) factor that later needs a constant-majorant/exponent-reserve proof.
This field is the intended source premise for the Lean-facing heq237_fixed obligation.

formulas.statement: Operational normalized shape of Eq. (2.37) fixed-Z0prime display.
formulas.ascii: abs(sum_{D,P,Z0 in fiber(Z0prime)} term) <= exp(-(kappa1-1)*(LM)^(-4)*|Z\Z0prime|) * prod_{Zi prime comp of Z0prime} (2*(L+2)^4*O(1)*epsilon2*exp(-((1-7*delta)/2)*L*kappa*d_{k+1}(Zi prime))) * exp(O(1)*alpha5*|Z|)
formulas.latex: |\sum_{D,P,Z_0\in\mathrm{fiber}(Z_0\prime)} \mathrm{term}|\le e^{-(\kappa_1-1)(LM)^{-4}|Z\setminus Z_0\prime|}\prod_{Z_i\prime} igl(2(L+2)^4O(1)\epsilon_2 e^{- rac{1-7\delta}{2}L\kappa d_{k+1}(Z_i\prime)} igr)e^{O(1)\alpha_5|Z|}
assumptions: Must be checked against rendered CMP116 pages 19-20 before becoming source_verified.

Whether the absolute value is before or after all internal finite reindexing steps.

citations.summary: Separate target for the paragraph after Eq. (2.37): the last sum over Z0prime or Z\Z0prime.
extracted_claims: The source paragraph uses an adapted Eq. (2.32), half of the first exponential factor and the condition (1/2)*(kappa1-1) >= 2*L*kappa.
This should feed a separate hpost_eq237 / final-summation premise rather than being collapsed silently into Eq. (2.37).
The result is the combined post-P source bound consumed by the Lean theorem-generated route.

formulas.ascii: sum_{Z0prime or Z\Z0prime} reserve_weight * fixed_Z0prime_bound <= combined_postP_source_bound

citations.summary: Dictionary target for D/P/Z0/Z0prime indices and the fixed-Z0prime fiber.
extracted_claims: Eq. (2.37) is order-sensitive: the source sums over D, P, Z0 and then reorganizes by fixed Z0prime.
Lean already has names such as cmp116Eq237Z0PrimeIndex, cmp116Eq237GlobalZ0PrimeIndex, cmp116Eq237Z0Fiber and cmp116Eq237_nested_sum_eq_fiber_sum.

Lean also exposes cmp116Eq237GlobalZ0PrimeIndex_mem_iff and cmp116Eq237SourceZ0PrimeIndex_eq_global_of_mem_iff as repository-side global-index dictionary helpers; the source-side membership equivalence remains an explicit input.
The source dictionary must prove that the Lean fiber exactly captures the source choices for fixed Z0prime.

formulas.ascii: (D,P,Z0) in SourceFiber(Z0prime) <-> (D,P,Z0) in cmp116Eq237Z0Fiber R Z Z0prime
assumptions: Needs D/P/Z0 source dictionaries, including the Eq. (2.31) P-family dictionary.
formulas.conclusion: Feeds nested-sum equality and fixed-Z0prime bound application.

formulas.statement: Target dictionary for the global fixed-Z0prime index used by the final post-(2.37) summation.
formulas.ascii: sourceZ0PrimeIndex = cmp116Eq237GlobalZ0PrimeIndex R after a supplied source membership iff
assumptions: Needs source membership equivalence for fixed Z0prime choices.
Needs D/P/Z0 source dictionaries before this can feed the final summation.
formulas.conclusion: Feeds the final Z0prime summation and fixed-Z0prime fiber reindexing.

citations.summary: Constant hierarchy target around alpha5, epsilon2, O(1), C3 and final Lemma-3 amplitude.
extracted_claims: Primary source key cmp116.constants.c3-alpha5 records alpha5 definition region, boundedness assumptions on (LM)^4 times alpha0/alpha1/alpha4/gamma2 and the C3 formula.
The proof must decide whether distinct O(1) constants require distinct Lean fields or a common majorant.
The final C3*epsilon1 amplitude must not be used to backfill upstream Eq. (2.37) or Eq. (2.31) source estimates.

citations.summary: Route for the exponent reserve turning seven-delta Eq. (2.37) decay into the canonical eight-delta Lemma-3 weight.
extracted_claims: Lean already has cmp116Eq237_residualExponent_absorbed for the pure exponent step.
The source work still needs to prove that the residual exponent budget hypotheses match the page-20 paragraph and constant hierarchy.
Do not reprove this as a new wrapper; feed the existing pure exponent lemma with source-derived hypotheses.

formulas.latex: rac{1-7\delta}{2}	ext{-decay}+ rac{\delta}{2}	ext{-reserve}\Rightarrow  rac{1-8\delta}{2}	ext{-canonical decay}
assumptions: Residual budget must be proven from post-(2.37) source paragraph and metric comparisons.

citations.summary: Target the conversion from the product over connected components Zi prime to Lean source families.
extracted_claims: The Eq. (2.37) source display is product-shaped over connected components of Z0prime.
Lean consumers want a finite family with component metric weights and amplitude factors.
The dictionary must preserve component decomposition, connectedness convention and d_{k+1} metric normalization.

formulas.ascii: prod_{Zi prime comp of Z0prime} component_weight(Zi prime) = Lean component-family product/sum weight
assumptions: Exact component set and metric d_{k+1} dictionary required.
formulas.conclusion: Feeds fixed-Z0prime source estimate and final post-P majorization.

citations.summary: Recommended one-commit sequence for converting Eq. (2.37) source data into Lean consumers.

assumptions: Each commit should remove or narrow one live premise.

formulas.ascii: render_source_19 + render_source_20 + clean excerpt + SHA256 -> source_extracted candidate
